series_metadata.series_description: Records generated by every agency system relating to operation of the system, servers, equipment and network devices (printers, copiers, switches, routers, etc.) to document all usage and function of the individual system. Records may include system usage files; internet usage; charge-back files; data entry logs; computer program usage; summary reports; system audits; system security; and any additional log that can be generated from an agency system.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain the most updated version. Destroy outdated or superseded records when no longer of administrative value., Electronic: Delete
